2.1.0: On desktop and on Android with a mouse connected, you can now use your mouse's back and forward side buttons to navigate between screens.
Fixed an issue where the last option in panels like Account details and Theme could be hidden behind Android's navigation bar; panels now open fully visible.
2.0.2: Fixed an issue that could sign you out of your account on its own in some cases.
2.0.1: Fixed an issue where the app could keep retrying to sync in the background, using extra battery and data.
Fixed scrolling in the AI daily study on tablets in landscape: it now scrolls when you drag anywhere on the panel, including the side edges.
Fixed an issue where the status bar icons didn't update correctly when changing the app theme, making them hard to see.
2.0.0: New: AI Daily Study — generate an analysis of each day's readings, with an overview, historical context, and questions for reflection.
Redesigned the Pro screen, theme picker, language picker, and Bible version picker for a cleaner, more consistent look.

New 'Support & comments' section on the profile screen: contact support with a ready-made email, or rate the app directly on the store. On Android, rating now opens Google Play's review dialog right inside the app.
On iOS, switching between the Plans, Books, and More tabs now uses a smooth fade instead of a sliding animation.
You can now check for updates from the profile screen, and the app lets you know when a new version is available. On Android you can download and install the update without leaving the app.
New Account details screen: see your login method and sign-in history, and manage every device connected to your account — rename a device or remotely sign it out.
1.19.1: Fixed an issue where a day's 'Completed date' showed as 'No date set' when you finished the day by reading its chapters from the reading screen; it now shows the date of your most recent reading for that day.
1.19.0: The reading plan screen has a fresh, more beautiful new look.
A highlighted card at the top shows your next reading and adapts to where you are — just starting, today's reading, all caught up, ahead of plan, or picking up where you left off.
Weeks are now grouped into 'This week', 'Up next', and 'Completed', and you can collapse or expand the upcoming and completed groups.
The progress card now shows a circular progress ring along with your reading streak.
A button now takes you straight to your current reading and briefly highlights it.
Marking a day as read now responds instantly.
While the reading plan loads, you now see smooth placeholders instead of a loading spinner.
Numbers and the day toggles now animate smoothly as your progress changes.
While the Bible versions list loads, you now see smooth placeholders instead of a loading spinner.
1.18.2: Fixed the position of the quick-action buttons on the reading plan screen, which could be hidden behind the phone's navigation bar, overlap the last day in the list, or leave a large empty gap above them.
1.18.1: Fixed a brief flicker when reopening the app, where your account info and Pro status could momentarily appear as still loading.
1.18.0: On the book details screen, the synopsis 'Show more' now appears right after the text instead of on a separate line below it.
1.17.0: The 'More' screen now opens instantly, with sections appearing right away; only the parts still loading show a smooth loading effect.
The synopses for the books of the Bible have been rewritten to tell more clearly what happens in each book and what its central theme is.
1.16.0: You can now sign in with Google and Apple.
Your data now syncs across all your devices when you're signed in.
Fixed the Gospel of John, which showed the wrong text or appeared as not downloaded.
You can now become a Pro user.
1.15.0: The reading plan screen now uses a two-column layout on tablets and larger displays, with the progress panel on the left and the weeks list on the right, both scrollable independently across the full screen.
Today's reading is now highlighted in the day list, making it easier to find where you should be.
Smoother response when marking days as read in the reading plan, especially on older devices.
Improved vertical alignment between the progress panel and the weeks list in the new two-column reading plan layout.
The message in the plan progress card now adapts to your journey, highlighting book milestones, your reading streak, today's reading, or your overall Bible progress.
1.14.0: When changing the app language, the current language now appears highlighted at the top of the list, with the rest sorted alphabetically.
1.13.0: Fix extra whitespace below the search bar on the books screen.
You can now change the app language from the 'More' screen. English, Portuguese (Brazil), and Spanish are available.
1.12.0: Notifications about the download progress of Bible versions.
1.11.0: Bible available for download and offline reading.
Users can now select the text from the book synopsis.
1.10.0: Improved dynamic configuration loading on iOS to prevent synchronization issues.
Added localized network permission descriptions on iOS.
New book details screen to track your progress chapter by chapter.
Improved accessibility for the favorite button.
1.9.0: Refactored the "More" screen for better organization and usability.
Display the current app version in the "More" screen.
Detection of the current app version is now dynamic in the release notes.
1.8.1: Fix a bug that could cause reading progress to be lost after an update.
1.8.0: Refactoring of date representation logic to be more dynamic.
UI improvements for future version display.
Change icon colors in the "More" screen for some items.
Improved Theme Selection UI: new layout, added contrast selection, and moved dynamic colors option.
1.7.0: Introduce loading to indicate that some remote configs are fetching from the server.
New books screen that allows you to track progress, perform searches, apply filters, sort, and favorite.
1.6.2: Await for some remote configuration before bein able to proceed with other operations.
1.6.1: Spacing fixes in a lot of screens, mainly for Android 15+ in system bars.
1.6.0: New "More", screen focoused in general settings and useful links.
Fix scrolling in some screens in landscape format.
Use cards in the user interface for passage lists in day details screen.
1.4.0: Implement personal notes for reading plan days.
Correct formatting in the notes section.
1.3.0: Add planned read dates to reading plan days.
Fix: correct calculation of planned read date.
Change text order in the top bar of day details screen.
1.2.2: Fix: day details missing information when we should read specific verses.
1.2.1: Fix date formatting to support localized month names.
1.2.0: Add transition animation when navigating from plans screen to the day details screen. The animation was added in the words for the day and week.
Animate progress counters for day and progress in plans screen and day details screen.
Add visibility animation to the "go to unread" button.
Add English and Spanish localization for app name in iOS.
1.1.0: Replace icon for change theme in the reading plans screen.
Show snackbar message when no reading progress to delete.
1.0.0: The first version of Bible Planner 🚀.
